channel.title: Projects on Laia Giralt Solé
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Laia Giralt Solé

item.title: EGC Heartbeat Classification and Deep Learning Analysis
item.description:
September – December 2024

Summary

I engineered a multi-class deep learning pipeline to classify 87,000+ ECG heartbeat images into five diagnostic categories to enable high-precision automated screening.

Details

  • Architectures: Transfer learning with ResNet-18 and DenseNet-121 (pretrained weights).
  • Results: Peak macro F1 score of 0.739, outperforming custom CNN baselines by ~40%.
  • Techniques: Probabilistic noise-based augmentation, inverse-square-root weighted oversampling, robust data pipeline to mitigate class imbalance and distribution shifts.

Resources

  • Download resume

item.title: DataFest — CourseKata Engagement Analysis
item.description:
DataFest — CourseKata Engagement Analysis

January - May 2024

Award: Winner of the Best Insight Award at DataFest

Overview

Analyzed 1.5 GB of student engagement data from CourseKata to uncover what drives meaningful learning interactions. Delivered actionable insights that helped stakeholders understand how interactivity influences engagement and learning outcomes.

Key Contributions

  • Tools & Methods: Python for data cleaning, processing, and visualization; merged session logs with content metadata to assess engagement quality.

Findings
